description_long: This is a standard manual screwdriver featuring a cylindrical, contoured green handle made of plastic, designed for a comfortable grip. The handle transitions smoothly into a long, straight metallic shaft, which is robust and likely made of steel. The tip of the shaft is pointed and flat, indicating a flathead screwdriver suitable for slotted screws. The handle is opaque and solid, with no visible branding or markings. The surface of the handle appears smooth with a matte finish, while the metal shaft has a slightly reflective, polished look. There are no visible signs of wear, scratches, or damage, and the tool appears to be in excellent condition.
description: A green-handled flathead screwdriver with a smooth plastic grip and a long, polished metal shaft. The tool is clean and undamaged, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the green handle and the straight metal shaft with a flathead tip.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, displaying its rounded, contoured shape and the rectangular cross-section of the shaft.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full handle and shaft, with the flathead tip visible at the left.
description_view_3: End-on view of the tip, highlighting the flathead geometry and the rounded end of the handle.
